# Renaissance AI and Education Resource Hub — Compact Index

> 1181 curated evidence-based K-12 and higher education resources.
> Last updated: 2026-05-13

This file lists all entries (title, URL, type, tags) without descriptions.

## Tags

**Domain:** k-12 (858), learning-engineering (267), higher-ed (207), literacy (205), math-education (175), early-childhood (116), english-learners (85), school-discipline (31)

**Method:** longitudinal (208), rct (123), computer-assisted-learning (94), meta-analysis (62), coaching (47), genai (42), intelligent-tutoring (41), response-to-intervention (40), qualitative-research (35), llm-application (26), nlp (19), automated-feedback (11), a-b-testing (7)

**Topic:** formative-assessment (179), professional-development (164), open-datasets (106), college-access (88), sel (78), digital-learning-platforms (74), personalized-learning (71), career-readiness (66), prekindergarten (45), student-belonging (37), dropout-prevention (34), attendance (28), ai-ethics (27), data-sharing (26), math-strategies (24), ai-policy (21), pii-privacy (19), inclusive-design (19), writing-instruction (16), math-motivation (10), genai-tutoring (4), math-word-problems (2)

**Affiliation:** digital-promise (254), wwc (198), aims (53), jedm (39), lpi (35), edtrust (31), jla (25), campbell-collaboration (20), cmu-learnlab (18), tools-competition (18), lsu (13), northwestern-e4 (10), assistments (9), carnegie-learning (7), rppl (5), khan-academy (5), upgrade-platform (3), norc (2), duolingo (2), nap (2), lastinger-center (1), tla (1), casel (1)
